languages.text: Неизвестный сумел унять машинных духов, хотя зенитные орудия неисправны. Для этого нужны коды высокого доступа.

traits.locale_text: Неизвестный сумел унять машинных духов, хотя зенитные орудия неисправны. Для этого нужны коды высокого доступа.

languages.text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.
languages.original_text: Неизвестный сумел унять машинных духов, хотя зенитные орудия неисправны. Для этого нужны коды высокого доступа.

traits.locale_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.
Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.
Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

languages.text: Jemandem ist es gelungen, die Maschinengeister zu beschwichtigen, obwohl die Flugabwehrbatterie nicht funktioniert. Dazu sind hochrangige Zugangscodes erforderlich.
languages.original_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

traits.locale_text: Jemandem ist es gelungen, die Maschinengeister zu beschwichtigen, obwohl die Flugabwehrbatterie nicht funktioniert. Dazu sind hochrangige Zugangscodes erforderlich.

languages.text: 有人成功安抚了机魂，但防空炮组依然存在故障。需要高级访问代码才可处理。
languages.original_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

traits.locale_text: 有人成功安抚了机魂，但防空炮组依然存在故障。需要高级访问代码才可处理。

languages.text: Quelqu'un a réussi à apaiser les esprits de la machine, mais la batterie d'artillerie antiaérienne semble connaître un dysfonctionnement. Cela nécessite des codes d'accès de haut niveau.
languages.original_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

traits.locale_text: Quelqu'un a réussi à apaiser les esprits de la machine, mais la batterie d'artillerie antiaérienne semble connaître un dysfonctionnement. Cela nécessite des codes d'accès de haut niveau.

languages.text: Alguien ha logrado apaciguar a los espíritus máquina, aunque la batería antiaérea está averiada. Esto requiere códigos de acceso de alto nivel.
languages.original_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

traits.locale_text: Alguien ha logrado apaciguar a los espíritus máquina, aunque la batería antiaérea está averiada. Esto requiere códigos de acceso de alto nivel.

languages.text: Hava savunma bataryası arızalı olsa da biri, makine ruhlarını yatıştırmayı başarmış. Bu, üst düzey erişim kodlarını gerektiriyor.
languages.original_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

traits.locale_text: Hava savunma bataryası arızalı olsa da biri, makine ruhlarını yatıştırmayı başarmış. Bu, üst düzey erişim kodlarını gerektiriyor.

languages.text: 防空砲の故障は、機体の精霊を鎮めた結果である。高レベルのアクセスコードが必要だ。
languages.original_text: Someone has managed to appease the machine spirits, although the air defence battery is malfunctioning. This requires high-level access codes.

traits.locale_text: 防空砲の故障は、機体の精霊を鎮めた結果である。高レベルのアクセスコードが必要だ。
